entries.name: Herald
entries.definition: You announce divine messages and coming changes.

entries.name: Guardian
entries.definition: You protect sacred knowledge and those who seek it.

entries.name: Sage
entries.definition: You embody wisdom and share profound insights.

entries.name: Warrior
entries.definition: You battle darkness and defend divine order.

entries.name: Mystic
entries.definition: You reveal hidden truths through direct experience.

entries.name: Teacher
entries.definition: You guide others to understanding and mastery.

entries.name: Healer
entries.definition: You restore balance and wholeness to all levels.

entries.name: Judge
entries.definition: You uphold divine law and cosmic justice.

entries.name: Artificer
entries.definition: You craft and shape energies into new forms.

entries.name: Messenger
entries.definition: You carry vital communications between realms.

entries.name: Catalyst
entries.definition: You spark transformation and radical change.

entries.name: Keeper
entries.definition: You preserve and maintain sacred traditions.

entries.name: Guide
entries.definition: You lead others through spiritual territories.

entries.name: Mediator
entries.definition: You bridge different realms and viewpoints.

entries.name: Champion
entries.definition: You represent and advance divine causes.
